name: ut-tdd
description: UT-TDD Agent Harness - AI agent workflow, verification, and distribution foundation (TypeScript core, ADR-001)

scripts.test: vitest run tests/setup.test.ts tests/distribution-acceptance.test.ts tests/skill-recommend.test.ts tests/skill-scaffold.test.ts tests/dependency-drift.test.ts tests/readability.test.ts --reporter=dot
scripts.test:pack: vitest run tests/setup.test.ts tests/distribution-acceptance.test.ts tests/skill-recommend.test.ts tests/skill-scaffold.test.ts tests/dependency-drift.test.ts tests/readability.test.ts --reporter=dot
scripts.test:fast: vitest run --exclude tests/cli-surface.test.ts --exclude tests/db-projection-ingestion.test.ts --exclude tests/distribution-acceptance.test.ts --exclude tests/doctor.test.ts --exclude tests/drive-db-registration.test.ts --exclude tests/projection-writer.test.ts --exclude tests/review-green-command-projection.test.ts --exclude tests/runtime-hook-entrypoints.test.ts
scripts.test:db: bun run src/cli.ts db rebuild && vitest run tests/db-projection-ingestion.test.ts tests/drive-db-registration.test.ts tests/projection-writer.test.ts tests/review-green-command-projection.test.ts
